title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE ECHAGUE EAST CENTRAL SCHOOL IN ECHAGUE, ISABELA, TO TUGUEGARAO-STO. DOMINGO ELEMENTARY SCHOOL

chunks.text:
H. No. 24515 / 88 OG No. 14, 1848 (Apr. 6, 1992)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7204, March 02, 1992 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE ECHAGUE EAST CENTRAL SCHOOL IN ECHAGUE, ISABELA, TO TUGUEGARAO-STO. DOMINGO ELEMENTARY SCHOOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Echague East Central School in Echague, lsabela, is hereby changed to Tuguegarao-Sto. Domingo Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) NEPTALI A. GONZALES

(Sgd.)

RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on May 16, 1991 and December 3, 1991, respectively.

(Sgd.) ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

(Sgd.)

CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: March 2, 1992

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
